_meta.description: Extraction schemas per document category - defines what fields to extract and how

output_columns.description: Standard output columns for ALL categories

columns.name: material
columns.description: Product/material the document refers to. NULL for ISO and CUI.

columns.name: data_expirare
columns.description: Expiration date (DD.MM.YYYY) or duration ('2 ani de la receptie'). NULL if no expiration.

columns.name: companie
columns.description: Main company. For CE/ISO: the certification body. For others: the declaring/certified company.

columns.name: distribuitor
columns.description: Distributor of the material in Romania

ISO.description: Certificate ISO (9001, 14001, 45001, 50001) - certifică sisteme de management

special_rules.material_reason: ISO certifică sisteme de management, NU materiale fizice

ISO.extraction_prompt: Extract: certified company name, certificate expiration date, ISO standard number (e.g., 'ISO 9001:2015'), company address. NOTE: Do NOT put the ISO standard in the 'material' field - ISO certifies management systems, not physical materials. For 'nume_document', write 'Certificat ISO [standard]'.

CE.description: Certificate CE/PED - Directiva Echipamente sub Presiune

special_rules.producator_is: fabricantul materialului (e.g., HEBEI HUAYANG STEEL PIPE)
special_rules.companie_is: organismul de CERTIFICARE care a emis certificatul (e.g., TÜV Rheinland, TÜV SÜD, Bureau Veritas, Lloyd's)
special_rules.distinction_reason: Producator ≠ Companie: producatorul fabrică materialul, compania certifică conformitatea
special_rules.nume_document_format: Certificat CE PED sau Certificat CE

CE.extraction_prompt: Extract data from this CE/PED certificate. IMPORTANT distinction: 'producator' = the manufacturer of the product. 'companie' = the CERTIFICATION BODY that issued the certificate (e.g., TÜV Rheinland, TÜV SUD, Bureau Veritas, Lloyd's). These are DIFFERENT entities. Also extract material/product, expiration date, producer address.

FISA_TEHNICA.description: Fișe tehnice - specificații tehnice ale produsului
FISA_TEHNICA.extraction_prompt: Extract: producer name, product/material name (full name with type, e.g., 'Tevi PE100 PEHD pentru apa'), producer address.

AGREMENT.extraction_prompt: Extract: producer name, expiration date, material/product name, company that holds the agrement, producer address. Look for 'valabil pana la', 'valabilitate' for the expiration date.

AVIZ_TEHNIC.extraction_prompt: Extract: producer name, expiration date, material/product, company (the certification body if applicable), producer address.

AVIZ_TEHNIC_SI_AGREMENT.description: Aviz tehnic combinat cu agrement tehnic

special_rules.nume_document_format: Aviz Tehnic si Agrement Tehnic (NOT just 'Aviz Tehnic')

AVIZ_TEHNIC_SI_AGREMENT.extraction_prompt: Extract: producer name, expiration date, material/product, company name, producer address. For 'nume_document', this should be 'Aviz Tehnic si Agrement Tehnic' (NOT just 'Aviz Tehnic').

AVIZ_SANITAR.description: Avize sanitare pentru materiale în contact cu apa potabilă
AVIZ_SANITAR.extraction_prompt: Extract: company holding the sanitary approval, material/product, expiration date, producer, producer address. Look very carefully for expiration - check for 'valabil', 'expira', 'pana la'. If no expiration is stated anywhere, use null.

special_rules.material_note: If generic ('produse pentru constructii'), keep as is. If it's a template (MODEL), material = 'Produse (document model)'

DECLARATIE_CONFORMITATE.extraction_prompt: Extract: product/material name (the actual product - if generic like 'produse pentru constructii', keep it as is but add any specifics from the document context), producer name, declaring company, producer address.

DECLARATIE_PERFORMANTA.extraction_prompt: Extract: product/material name (full description with specs), producer name, producer address. Keep material name concise but specific (max 100 chars).

CERTIFICAT_CALITATE.extraction_prompt: Extract: product/material name - the PHYSICAL PRODUCT being certified. Look for pipe type (PEHD, PVC, PE100), dimensions (DN, PN, SDR). If the product field is empty (template document) but a standard reference exists, DEDUCE the material from the standard. Also extract producer and company.

special_rules.data_expirare_reason: Warranty starts from delivery/reception date, so expiration = duration like '2 ani de la receptie', '24 luni de la data livrarii'
special_rules.material_note: If long list of products, summarize (e.g., 'Tevi si fitinguri PVC, PP, PE, PEX')

CERTIFICAT_GARANTIE.extraction_prompt: Extract: product/material under warranty (keep CONCISE, max 80 chars - summarize if list is long), producer name, producer address, warranty period/expiration. For data_expirare: extract the warranty DURATION (e.g., '2 ani de la receptie', '24 luni'). If multiple warranty periods exist, extract the main/longest one.

AUTORIZATIE_DISTRIBUTIE.description: Autorizații de distribuție de la producător pentru distribuitor

special_rules.calculate_expiry: If no explicit expiration but has issue_date + validity_period, CALCULATE it
special_rules.contract_duration: If validity = 'pe durata contractului', write 'Pe durata contractului'

AUTORIZATIE_DISTRIBUTIE.extraction_prompt: Extract: distributor company, producer company, issue date, validity period, expiration date, material/product, producer address. If the authorization is generic ('produsele achizitionate'), write 'Produse diverse (autorizatie generala)'. If no explicit expiration date but has validity period, CALCULATE it. If validity = 'pe durata contractului', write 'Pe durata contractului'.

CUI.description: Certificate de Înregistrare (Cod Unic de Identificare)

special_rules.material_reason: CUI is a company registration document, not related to specific materials
special_rules.cui_in_companie_reason: CUI number should NOT be appended to company name. Store separately.

CUI.extraction_prompt: Extract: company name (EXACTLY as registered), CUI number (just digits), registered address. For 'nume_document', use 'Certificat de Inregistrare'.

ALTELE.description: Documente care nu se încadrează în celelalte categorii
ALTELE.extraction_prompt: Extract: any company name and material/product mentioned.

flag_review_if: companie field > 80 characters (likely a list, not a single company)
material contains Chinese characters without Latin equivalent
any company field contains comma-separated list of companies
data_expirare is not DD.MM.YYYY and not a recognized duration pattern
